items.title: Search
items.desc: Enter your departure, destination, and travel date to find the right bus.

items.title: Select Trip
items.desc: Choose your trip, departure time, and seat type based on your preference.

items.title: Payment
items.desc: Fast and secure online payment with multiple payment options available.

items.title: Get Ticket
items.desc: Receive your e-ticket via email or SMS. Present it when boarding.

services.title: OUR SERVICES
services.subtitle: AnhHuy92 offers a variety of transport services for passengers

items.title: Passenger Transport
items.desc: Fixed-route passenger transport: Hanoi – Ha Long – Van Don – Cam Pha – Mong Cai – Tra Co. Premium buses with AC and WiFi.

items.title: Express Delivery
items.desc: Fast, secure parcel and goods delivery between provinces at competitive prices. Real-time tracking available.

items.title: Contract & Cargo
items.desc: Track your order or transport contract by tracking code. Transparent, accurate, and continuously updated.

items.title: Free WiFi

items.desc: Vehicles are cleaned and disinfected after every trip.

items.title: Dual-zone AC

items.title: Phone Charging
items.desc: Each seat has USB port and power outlet for charging devices.

about.pageSubtitle: AnhHuy92 Bus – Over 20 years of passenger service
about.heading: About AnhHuy92 Bus
about.para1: AnhHuy92 Bus was established in 2003 and is one of the most trusted passenger transport operators on the Hanoi – Hung Yen – Hai Duong – Hai Phong – Mong Cai route. Over more than 20 years of operation, we have served millions of passengers with continuously improving service quality.
about.para2: With a modern fleet and a team of experienced, professionally trained drivers skilled in safe driving and customer service, AnhHuy92 is committed to providing a comfortable, safe, and punctual travel experience for all passengers.
about.para3: We continuously invest in renewing our fleet, upgrading the online booking system, and expanding our agent network to serve passengers better every day.

items.title: Safety
items.desc: Safety is our top priority on every trip. Vehicles are regularly inspected and drivers strictly follow traffic regulations.

items.title: Punctuality
items.desc: We commit to departing and arriving on time. Passengers can confidently plan their journeys.

items.title: Quality
items.desc: Premium vehicles with full amenities: air conditioning, WiFi, comfortable seats, complimentary drinks.

items.title: Dedication
items.desc: Friendly, attentive staff supporting passengers from booking to safe arrival.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.quote: "Connecting people and bringing convenience and safety to every journey. AnhHuy92 is more than a bus company – we are your trusted travel companion on every road."

schedule.pageSubtitle: Bus departure times and daily schedule information

notes.title: 📢 Notes
items: Schedule may change on public holidays and Tet. Please call hotline 0967046789 to confirm.
Passengers should arrive at the terminal at least 15 minutes before departure.
Ticket price includes seat reservation fee, excluding oversized baggage fees.
Children under 5 traveling with adults are free (no seat occupied).

items.title: AnhHuy92 Bus launches new online ticketing system
items.excerpt: From March 2025, passengers can book AnhHuy92 tickets fully online through our website with a user-friendly interface and fast payments.

items.title: Tet Holiday 2025 Schedule – Early Booking Information
items.excerpt: AnhHuy92 Bus announces the Tet 2025 schedule and early booking guide to ensure seats for passengers traveling home for Tet.

items.title: 10 new premium sleeper buses added on Hanoi – Hai Phong route
items.excerpt: To meet growing travel demand, AnhHuy92 invests in 10 more premium sleeper buses with full modern amenities.

items.title: Promotion – 20% off bus tickets in November
items.excerpt: Celebrating 21 years of establishment, AnhHuy92 offers 20% off vouchers for the first 500 passengers booking online in November 2024.

items.title: Guide to sending goods via AnhHuy92 Bus
items.excerpt: AnhHuy92's cargo delivery service is fast, safe, and affordable. Orders can be tracked in real-time via tracking code.

items.title: New office opens in Nam Dinh
items.excerpt: AnhHuy92 opens a new office at 45 Tran Hung Dao Street, Nam Dinh City, to better serve passengers on the Nam Dinh – Hanoi route.
